name: Dragunity Corsesca
name_jp: ドラグニティ－コルセスカ
desc: When a monster equipped with this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle: You can add 1 Level 4 or lower monster from your Deck to your hand with the same Type and Attribute as the monster this card is equipped to.
mnst_eff: When a monster equipped with this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle: You can add 1 Level 4 or lower monster from your Deck to your hand with the same Type and Attribute as the monster this card is equipped to.
eff: When a monster equipped with this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle: You can add 1 Level 4 or lower monster from your Deck to your hand with the same Type and Attribute as the monster this card is equipped to.

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
